title: Calculating a weekly wage
problem: Cam earns $\$19.50$ per hour and works $38$ hours per week. Calculate his weekly wage and annual salary.

steps.instruction: Calculate the weekly wage by multiplying the hourly rate by the number of hours.
Calculate the annual salary by multiplying the weekly wage by 52 weeks.

title: Calculating pay with overtime
problem: Nico earns $\$28.00$ per hour. One week he worked $38$ ordinary hours, $3$ hours at time-and-a-half, and $2$ hours at double time. Calculate his total pay for that week.

steps.instruction: Calculate the time-and-a-half rate, then the time-and-a-half pay.
Calculate the double-time rate, then the double-time pay.
Add all three components to find the total pay.

title: Calculating net pay after deductions
problem: Yuki's annual salary is $\$62\,400$. Each week, $21\%$ is deducted for income tax and $\$55$ is deducted for superannuation. Calculate her weekly net pay.

steps.instruction: Find the weekly gross pay by dividing the annual salary by 52.
Subtract both deductions from the gross pay to find net pay.
